Suppose there is a running batch, and there are multiple requests to be chunk-prefilled. The running batch's future result will be resolved after all the prefill requests are done.
So the buffer len calculation would add an extra size max_num_chunks_per_req * ma

sglang.title: fix: spec overlap `predict` shape does not match verify output shapes
sglang.author: timmy-feng
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
In spec overlap v2, the predict tensor stores token IDs sampled from tree verify. This is later used in draft extend after decode.
When num_draft_tokens is not equal to bs * (spec_steps + 1), there is a shape conflict in llama_eagle3.py:88. hidden_states has shape (num_draft_tokens, hidde

sglang.title: [VLM] Support InternVL Vision Encoder Data Parallelism
sglang.author: yuan-luo
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

This PR is to support InternVL Vision-Encoder data parallelism. #12971
From profiling we can see InternVL Vision-Encoder is computing intensive, the CUDA command buffer is always full. This PR is to adopt Vision-Encoder data parallelism so as to dispatch the encode data computing to seve

sglang.title: Support FlashAttention3 page_size > 1 and topk > 1 case with paged attn and spec decode
sglang.author: yubofredwang
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Fully enable flash attention 3 backend with speculative decoding and paged attention use case where topk > 1 and page_size > 1.
The current implementation is still a fake support for page size > 1. In the assign_draft_cache_locs. we directly move the indices instead of the real kv cache.

Our Chat Completions API exposed a parallel_tool_calls parameter but didn't actually use that to control the number of tool calls returned. This fixes that, so that if a user sets parallel_tool_calls to False then we'll only return a single tool call for streaming or non-streaming responses

This PR generalizes current encoder-decoder attn_metadata.seq_lens computation in order to fix some hard-coded assumptions that are only valid for Whisper and based on static config values, rather than scheduler output.
Currently, GPUModelRunner._get_encoder_seq_lens returns the number of s

Purpose
When deciding if encoder outputs should be scattered into a large one during profiling we should be comparing it with the max size of mm embddings per item, instead of the encoder budget itself (it's often the case that they're equal given the default config and vllm args for many models, wh

vllm.title: Make Transformers Nightly tests soft-fail and enable all tests

Setting these tests to soft fail because they should not make vLLM's main branch to go red.
These tests are a smoke test to help us find problems with vLLM/Transformers on the Transformers main branch. This enables us to make fixes in vLLM/Transformers ahead of Transformers releases which smooths th

We have this whole logic for choosing the default setting for enable_prefix_caching based on the model (e.g., we want to disable it by default for hybrid models currently). However, it is totally ignored because enable_prefix_caching defaults to True when parsing the CLI args, so we never ac

vllm.title: dummy run corner case
vllm.author: xieyangxu
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Previous PR #28774 attempts to fix DP out of sync issue by adding a dummy_run call from DP ranks without active requests. It works for most of the time except a even rarer case. When async scheduling is enabled, all DP ranks could issue a dummy microbatch at the same time. In this case coordinate_ba

vllm.title: [Misc] Add backup hash algorithm for FIPS constrained environments
vllm.author: geodavic
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
There are many places where hashlib.md5 is used to compute hashes in configs. This algorithm isn't Federal Information Processing Standards (FIPS) compliant, and so the vLLM engine will fail to start inside environments where md5 is forcefully disabled.
Purpose
Add a backup hashing algorithm for env

vllm.title: [UX] Suppress gloo log spam
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
We basically always see a bunch of lines of - [Gloo] Rank 0 is connected to 0 peer ranks. Expected number of connected peer ranks is : 0 when starting up vLLM for many weeks now. I think we should suppress this for now since it is often many lines of log space. We will not suppress the outpu

vllm.title: Bump actions/checkout from 4 to 6
vllm.author: dependabot
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Bumps actions/checkout from 4 to 6.

Release notes
Sourced from actions/checkout's releases.

vllm.title: [Kernel] Use pre-allocated output buffer for triton kernel fused_experts
vllm.author: xyang16
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR is to use pre-allocated output buffer for triton kernel matmal_ogs

Fix N by overriding moe_problem_size() function in OAITritonExperts, because the super class moe_problem_size expects N to be the second dimension of w1, see here. But triton kernels expect N to be the third dimensio

vllm.title: [Performance][MLA][ROCm] Remove redundant D2D copy in deepseek
vllm.author: ganyi1996ppo
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
We found there are two redundant D2D copy in deepseek, which can be removed by in-place write inside the kernel.
Before


After


This PR replace those two index copy to inplace write inside the kernel, and we witness there are about 3% performance gain over deepseek on AMD Mi300 with 3.5k/1
